title: LIVE: Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid – Copa del Rey semifinal, second leg
fullText:
Skip linksSkip to ContentNavigation menuNewsAfricaAsiaUS & CanadaLatin AmericaEuropeAsia PacificMiddle EastExplainedOpinionSportVideoFeaturesEconomyHuman RightsClimate CrisisInvestigationsInteractivesIn PicturesScience & TechnologyPodcastsTravelFollow the build-up and live text commentary of the game as Barca attempt to come back from a 4-0 first-leg defeat.
Barcelona host Atletico Madrid for a Copa del Rey semifinal second-leg clash, with the home side seeking to overturn a 4-0 defeat from the first leg.
The match at Camp Nou, Barcelona, kicks off at 9pm (20:00 GMT).
summary: Follow the build-up and live text commentary of the game as Barca attempt to come back from a 4-0 first-leg defeat.
